channel.title: Allan V. C. Quadros on Allan Quadros
channel.description: Recent content in Allan V. C. Quadros on Allan Quadros

item.title: 'mRpostman' - IMAP Tools for R in a Tidy Way
item.description: mRpostman - IMAP Tools for R in a Tidy Way mRpostman is an R package to help you to easy connect to your IMAP (Internet Message Access Protocol) server and execute commands, such as listing mailboxes, fetching and searching for messages in a tidy way. It heavily relies on {curl} for issuing the IMAP commands. So far, mRpostman have been tested with Gmail, Yahoo Mail and AOL Mail, but it should also work with other mail providers.

item.title: Announcing the new 'emstreeR' package
item.description: Announcing the new ‘emstreeR’ package (2020’s {ggmap} update) I am proud to announce emstreeR - my first R package available on CRAN. emstreeR is a package for fast and easily computing Euclidean Minimum Spanning Trees (EMST). It heavily relies on RcppMLPACK and Rcpp to work as wrapper to the EMST Dual-Tree Boruvka algorithm (March, Ram, Gray, 2010)1 implemented in ‘mlpack’ - the C++ Machine Learning library (Curtin et al.

item.title: Scraping Google News with 'rvest'
item.description: Scraping Google News with rvest (2020’s update) Updated on 2020-12-05. This is an enhanced and substantially different version of the original article published in R-Bloggers in 2018. This is an example of how to scrape Google News website with the rvest package. First off, you should take a look at the Google News website HERE, which I reproduce below: You may notice, on the right side of the page, that we are using Google Chrome dev-tools.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Allan Vieira de Castro Quadros Email: allanvcq@gmail.com | allan.quadros@unf.edu Phone: +1(785)576-3130 Mailing Address Department of Management - Coggin College of Business University of North Florida 1 UNF Dr, Building 42, Room 1110 Jacksonville, FL 32224-7699 United States Social LinkedIn GitHub ResearchGate StackOverflow

item.title: Courses
item.description: Courses Here you’ll find materials for courses I have taught in the past or am currently teaching. Data Analytics & Programming Books: [1] Introduction to Data Analysis with R and the Tidyverse (2025). [2] Introdução à Análise de Dados em R utilizando Tidyverse (2020). (Portuguese version) Project Management Practice Apps: [1] Project Management Estimation App (2025) [2] Project Network App (2025) [3] Project Planner App (2025) [4] Earned Value Management Monitor App (2025)

item.title: Data Science
item.description: Software Below you will find more information about the main software projects I have been working on. R packages: [1] treeSS: Tree-Spatial Scan Statistic for Cluster Detection Description: treeSS detects clusters that combine spatial and hierarchical structure. It extends Kulldorff’s circular spatial scan statistic and the tree-based scan statistic by searching for anomalies across geographic regions and hierarchical tree branches simultaneously. The package ships standalone implementations of both methods and assesses statistical significance through Monte Carlo simulation under Poisson or binomial models, with optional OpenMP parallelization.

item.title: Main Publications
item.description: Peer-Reviewed Papers In descending chronological order: 1. Quadros A., Higgins M., Silverstein B. (2026) A Bayesian approach to generating distribution-based trading signals in pairs trading, Quantitative Finance, 1–21. [link] 2. Souza, P., A. Quadros, H. Dogan, Y. Li, Y.-C. Shi, and E. Karkle. (2026) Exploring Bread Quality through the Use of Commercial Bacterial and Fungal Xylanases: Effects on Dough Rheology, Loaf Volume, and Arabinoxylan Structure, Journal of Food Science, 91, no.

item.title: Talks
item.description: Recent & Upcoming Talks [17] Interactive & Effective Data Visualization: Enhancing Engagement and Understanding Description: Guest Lecture Date: Mar 04, 2026 10:30 AM — 11:45 AM Event: Campus Visit Venue: Herbert Wertheim College of Business, Department of Business Analytics, Information Systems & Supply Chain - Tallahassee, FL, USA [Slides] [16] mRpostman: Email as a Business Data Source. Applications in Operations Management and Marketing Date: Mar 03, 2026 03:00 PM — 04:00 PM
